error_signature: JSON inside body is not parsed correctly
title: Malformed JSON in webhook body
symptom: The incoming webhook payload contains a malformed JSON object in the body field, causing parsing issues. This prevents the extraction of necessary fields for further processing.
applies_when: Receiving data from an Elasticsearch alert
not_this_if: The JSON is valid and correctly formatted
The issue is not related to the webhook input
root_cause: The JSON object in the body field is improperly formatted, likely due to double-stringification or corruption. This results in a string that cannot be parsed directly into a JSON object, leading to errors when attempting to access its properties.
fix_steps: Use a Code node to extract the valid JSON string from the body field using a regular expression.
Parse the cleaned JSON string and return it as part of the output for further processing.
agent_instruction: Implement the provided code snippet in a Code node to clean and parse the malformed JSON.
